name: Paginator
description: Paginator is a generic component to display content in paged format.

props.name: rows
props.description: Data count to display per page.

props.name: first
props.description: Zero-relative number of the first row to be displayed.

props.name: pageLinkSize
props.description: Number of page links to display.

props.name: rowsPerPageOptions
props.description: Array of integer values to display inside rows per page dropdown.

props.name: template
props.description: Template of the paginator, can either be a string or an object with key-value pairs to define templates per breakpoint. Available templates are the following; - FirstPageLink - PrevPageLink - PageLinks - NextPageLink - LastPageLink - RowsPerPageDropdown - JumpToPageDropdown - JumpToPageInput - CurrentPageReport

props.name: currentPageReportTemplate
props.description: Template of the current page report element. It displays information about the pagination state. Available placeholders are the following; - {currentPage} - {totalPages} - {rows} - {first} - {last} - {totalRecords}

props.name: alwaysShow
props.description: Whether to show the paginator even there is only one page.

events.name: page
events.description: Callback to invoke when page changes, the event object contains information about the new state.

slots.name: start
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current state * @see PageState */ state: PageState; }): VNode[]

slots.name: end
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current state * @see PageState */ state: PageState; }): VNode[]

slots.name: firstpagelinkicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the jumptopagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom first page link icon template.

slots.name: firsticon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the jumptopagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom first page link icon template.

slots.name: prevpagelinkicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the jumptopagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom previous page link icon template.

slots.name: previcon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the jumptopagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom previous page link icon template.

slots.name: nextpagelinkicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the jumptopagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom finextrst page link icon template.

slots.name: nexticon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the jumptopagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom finextrst page link icon template.

slots.name: lastpagelinkicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the jumptopagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom last page link icon template.

slots.name: lasticon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the jumptopagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom last page link icon template.

slots.name: rowsperpagedropdownicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the rowsperpagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: jumptopagedropdownicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the jumptopagedropdown icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: container
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Index of first record */ first: number; /** * Index of last record */ last: number; /** * Number of rows to display in new page */ rows: number; /** * New page number */ page: number; /** * Total number of pages */ pageCount?: number; /** * Direct page links */ pageLinks?: number; /** * Total records */ totalRecords?: number; /** * First page function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ firstPageCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Last page function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ lastPageCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Previous page function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ prevPageCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Next page function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ nextPageCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Row change function. */ rowChangeCallback: (value: number) => void; /** * Page change function. */ changePageCallback: (value: number) => void; }): VNode[]
